'''âg-m-m-r''' ('''kagameroko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:fictionalize|fictionalize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-m-m-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fictionalize|fictionalize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âg-m-m-r
|-
! Lemma
| kagameroko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigameroko|thigameroko]] || [[word:jigameroko|jigameroko]] || [[word:shigameroko|shigameroko]] || [[word:kigameroko|kigameroko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugameroko|thuthugameroko]] || [[word:jujugameroko|jujugameroko]] || [[word:shushugameroko|shushugameroko]] || [[word:kukugameroko|kukugameroko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thugameroko|thugameroko]] || [[word:jugameroko|jugameroko]] || [[word:shugameroko|shugameroko]] || [[word:kugameroko|kugameroko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thugameroko|thugameroko]] || [[word:jugameroko|jugameroko]] || [[word:shugameroko|shugameroko]] || [[word:kugameroko|kugameroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thegameroko|thegameroko]] || [[word:jegameroko|jegameroko]] || [[word:shegameroko|shegameroko]] || [[word:kegameroko|kegameroko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thogameroko|thogameroko]] || [[word:jogameroko|jogameroko]] || [[word:shogameroko|shogameroko]] || [[word:kogameroko|kogameroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thogameroko|thogameroko]] || [[word:jogameroko|jogameroko]] || [[word:shogameroko|shogameroko]] || [[word:kogameroko|kogameroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠgameroko|thĂŠgameroko]] || [[word:jĂŠgameroko|jĂŠgameroko]] || [[word:shĂŠgameroko|shĂŠgameroko]] || [[word:kĂŠgameroko|kĂŠgameroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathagameroko|thathagameroko]] || [[word:jajagameroko|jajagameroko]] || [[word:shashagameroko|shashagameroko]] || [[word:kakagameroko|kakagameroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thagameroko|thagameroko]] || [[word:jagameroko|jagameroko]] || [[word:shagameroko|shagameroko]] || [[word:kagameroko|kagameroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thagameroko|thagameroko]] || [[word:jagameroko|jagameroko]] || [[word:shagameroko|shagameroko]] || [[word:kagameroko|kagameroko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
